overview.short: Gundla Brahmeshwaram Wildlife Sanctuary is a wildlife sanctuary located in the Nallamala Forest in Kurnool district of Andhra Pradesh, India.
overview.description: Gundla Brahmeshwaram Wildlife Sanctuary is a wildlife sanctuary located in the Nallamala Forest in Kurnool district of Andhra Pradesh, India. The northern part of the sanctuary is an important part of the Nagarjunsagar-Srisailam Tiger Reserve.

topPlaces.name: Nallamala Hills
topPlaces.description: The Nallamalas (also called the Nallamalla Range) are a section of the Eastern Ghats which forms the eastern boundary of Rayalaseema region of the state of Andhra Pradesh and Nagarkurnool district of the state of Telangana, in India. They run in a nearly north–south alignment, parallel to the Coromandel Coast for close to 430 km between th rivers, Krishna and Pennar.

items.note: The Nallamalas (also called the Nallamalla Range) are a section of the Eastern Ghats which forms the eastern boundary of Rayalaseema region of the state of Andhra Pradesh and Nagarkurnool district of the state of Telangana, in India. They run in a nearly north–south alignment, parallel to the Coromandel Coast for close to 430 km between th rivers, Krishna and Pennar.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Gundla Brahmeswaram Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The best time to visit Gundla Brahmeswaram Wildlife Sanctuary is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Gundla Brahmeswaram Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Kurnool Airport (74 km) and the nearest railway station is Kacheguda (Hyderabad) (194 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Gundla Brahmeswaram Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Gundla Brahmeswaram Wildlife Sanctuary at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Gundla Brahmeswaram Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: Stays in Gundla Brahmeswaram Wildlife Sanctuary start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Gundla Brahmeswaram Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The top attractions are Nallamala Hills.
